seoTitle: Mount Debateable vs Mount Edwards — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Debateable and Mount Edwards. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Debateable vs Mount Edwards: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Debateable and Mount Edwards.
heading: Mount Debateable vs Mount Edwards — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Debateable, Queensland and Mount Edwards, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Edwards has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mount Debateable (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Debateable or Mount Edwards safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Debateable has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Mount Edwards scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Debateable scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Edwards scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Debateable or Mount Edwards?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Edwards has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
